item.title: May Whitley demonstrating suffrajitsu, in the 1933 film "The Weaker Sex (Sayeth Thou!)"
item.description: Colorized and restored. Suffrajitsu is a collection of martial arts techniques shared amongst women for the goals of self defense in public and domestic life. The arts were collected from judo, jiujitsu, aikido and wing chun. After 100 years the same sports and self defense methods have evolved significantly, while the dangers largely remain. This was trailblazing and badass, useful for women, girls, immigrants, even men for self defense (largely against attacking men.) To those seeking confidence and looking at gyms to train around you: hit research, ask questions, see how many women and people of color are in regular attendance. Gyms can also attract predatory behaviors. Practicing self defense like striking, wrestling, judo, jiujitsu, armed self defense, all contribute to CONFIDENCE which is a key deterrent in self defense. Bad. Ass. Ladies. Hats off to them. FP edit: full B&W version also up on this channel! It's less than three minutes in entirety. Thanks for the love. Men would do well to play uke (demo partner) to women leadership more often.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.dc:creator: CrimsonPermanentAssurance

item.title: Lady, I'm from Alaska, I don't get cold in 70 degree weather.
item.description: She was wearing loose yoga pants, a jacket with the hood pulled tight around her face, and using a towel as a blanket. Everyone but my family was huddled under towels. I had on a tank top and shorts. Every time my husband left to grab food, get a drink, or use the bathroom, the lady would mock me for being cold and wet, telling me I should have dressed better. I was too hot! I sat in a spot to get sprayed by the ocean on purpose, I was soaked. There was a lot of wind, some light rain, and ocean spray, but it felt GOOD! Hawaii is too hot for me! We saw neat cliffs, caves, waterfalls, dolphins, whales and goats!

item.title: Cosplayers getting AI accusations everyday now - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/yuzu.pyon So every cosplayers I know myself included have been getting these comments more and more often. Unfortunately, I am still stuck in my flesh bag so my work remains 100% human made. DO NOT UNMUTE if you don't like shorts audios this one is rough lmao I chose it cause those comments make me angry and the music really fits my mood reading these comments so if it makes you angry too it just means you get to experience my feelings a little bit more lol how connected are we!!!
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @lwardlaw shared this work in progress, so detailed! Check out their other posts for more amazing artwork.
27 Man Tax: Tom Hiddleston
“Try not. Do. Or do not. There is no try.” - Yoda So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me Sorry I'm late! My nap accidentally lasted 8 hours.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: fortytwoembers

item.title: I think she’s happy
item.description: I picked up a pregnant mama cat yesterday to foster. She has had a rough go of it. She’s pregnant and she got attacked by a dog. A shelter found her three days ago and gave her all the medical attention she needed and now she is MINE. And I think she’s happy. I just want to make her feel comfortable and safe. She is SUCH a good flopper. And her purrs are like a Mack truck. We’re gonna find out tomorrow how many kittens she is harboring. I’m so excited!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: going on another adventure...
item.description: Been also making an effort to stay off electronics more and do less doom scrolling. But yea. Kinda wanting to just finish off my deviousness posts and only have maybe enough memes for 10ish regular posts. So also been considering calling it quits from imgur and just waiting for imgcat to launch. Going to run off to australia for a few weeks to bother @ShaggyRootsAgain more. So. Gonna be fun. Did have a post of too many pics from last time i meant to post and never got around to. Might just share some stuff during trip into my discord idk yet. But yea. Going to just enjoy my trip and stuffs. #potato #Shaggy #adventure #botheringadorableshaggu #makinmywaydowntown
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk
